name: Agriculture
tagline: Precision farming for national food security
description: Operation Dronagiri's Agriculture vertical deploys AI, IoT, and satellite analytics to transform India's farming landscape — from crop disease detection to smart irrigation and supply chain optimization.
overview: India's 140 million farmers face productivity, water, and market access challenges. Dronagiri connects agri-tech startups with corporate partners and state governments to deploy solutions at scale across pilot corridors.

successStories.title: 32% Crop Loss Reduction
successStories.desc: AgriSense AI deployed across 12,000 Nashik farms.

name: Livelihood & Skilling
description: The Livelihood vertical bridges India's skills gap through vernacular EdTech, vocational training, gig economy platforms, and women entrepreneurship programs.
overview: With 12 million annual job seekers and only 5% formally trained, Dronagiri's skilling initiatives align talent with industry needs while empowering rural and semi-urban communities.

name: Transportation & Infrastructure
description: From logistics optimization to GIS mapping and structural health monitoring, this vertical transforms India's transportation and infrastructure through deep-tech innovation.
overview: Dronagiri deploys smart highways, urban mobility platforms, port logistics AI, and geospatial intelligence across five pilot state corridors with corporate and government collaboration.

successStories.title: 40% Port Dwell Reduction
successStories.desc: PortLink optimized Mundra and Kandla operations.
